explanation: I entered the seeded GitLab username after landing on the protected new-issue form.
I entered the seeded GitLab password.
I signed in so GitLab can redirect back to the new-issue form.
I entered the deterministic issue title.

action.text: This issue was created by the NExUI GitLab save-and-verify benchmark task.

explanation: I entered the deterministic issue description.
I created the issue so I can verify the resulting issue-detail page.
